welcome.title: Welcome to Tribos
welcome.subtitle: Your smart training companion for cyclists
welcome.description: Tribos helps you train smarter by combining route planning, workout scheduling, and coaching into one seamless experience. Whether you're preparing for your first century or your next race, we've got the tools to help you get there.

features.title: Plan Your Training vs Training Analysis

items.name: Plan Your Training
items.description: Your interactive training calendar. Drag and drop workouts onto your schedule, build out your training weeks, and see your planned Ride Stress Score (RSS) alongside completed activities. Think of it as your whiteboard for mapping out what's ahead.

items.name: Training Analysis
items.description: Dive deep into completed rides. View your route on the map, analyze power and heart rate metrics, see intensity breakdowns, and understand how each ride contributes to your fitness. This is where you review what you've done.

features.summary: Plan looks forward. Analysis looks back. Use both to train with intention.

features.title: Meet Your Coaches
features.description: Three distinct coaching personalities, each designed for a specific part of your training journey.

items.name: Training Coach
items.description: Need workout ideas? The Training Coach suggests specific sessions based on your goals and recent activity. Get recommendations you can add to your calendar with one click.

items.name: Accountability Coach
items.description: Life gets busy. The Accountability Coach keeps you honest—tracking your weekly compliance, remembering your goals, and giving you the nudge (or reality check) you need to stay consistent.

items.name: Training Strategist
items.description: Thinking bigger picture? The Strategist helps with periodization, race prep, and long-term planning. Have strategic conversations about building toward your goals.
items.highlight: Plan your season, not just your week

updates.title: A new Today page: your Training Arc
updates.description: Today now opens on the Spine — a scrubbable arc of where your training has been and where it's headed. Slide across past and planned days to watch your fitness, fatigue, and form evolve, and get a persona-voiced Today's Call telling you what today is for.
details: Scrub the arc to see fitness, fatigue, and Form Score for any day — past or planned
Today's Call: your coach's one-line verdict on today, in their own voice
Recent rides map and coach conversation side by side
Honest first-run state — no dashboard of zeros before your first sync

updates.title: Route Builder 2 is now the builder
updates.description: The new builder is the one and only route builder, and it got a major capability wave: turn-by-turn cue sheets, push-to-Wahoo, public share links, draft autosave, and gravel-aware AI loops built from the real OSM gravel network.
details: Turn-by-turn cues on exports — your head unit gets real turn prompts, not just a breadcrumb
Push routes directly to Wahoo, share them with a public link
Draft autosave so a long build survives a crashed tab
Gravel and mixed-surface loops that follow the actual gravel network, with tangent clipping for cleaner out-and-backs
Open to guests — build a route before you even sign up

updates.title: COROS device sync
updates.description: COROS joins Garmin, Wahoo, and Strava as a first-class sync provider. Connect your COROS account in Settings and new activities import automatically.
details: Connect / disconnect from Settings → Connected Services
Automatic import of new activities via webhook
Manual sync button for pulling recent history on demand

updates.title: Clearer, more consistent training metrics
updates.description: A full accuracy pass on the numbers. Training metrics now use Tribos' own names — Ride Stress Score (RSS), Training Fitness Index (TFI), Form Score — and every surface shows the same value for the same day, computed from one canonical model.
details: Power and heart-rate zones unified on one 7-zone model everywhere
Form verdict bands aligned across the dashboard, Today, and the coach
Elevation charts redesigned with continuous grade coloring
Fixed cross-surface inconsistencies where two views could disagree on the same ride

updates.title: The Living Arc: coach plans that adapt
updates.description: Your coach can now build a real, race-aware training plan — block-periodized toward your goal event — and keep it alive. Upcoming quality sessions refill based on your actual fitness, and the plan respects your blocked days and preferences.
details: Race-aware plans that auto-activate toward your goal date
Fitness-gated refill: upcoming sessions adjust to how training is actually going
The coach explains the why behind each week, in its own voice
One-click clear of upcoming planned sessions from the calendar

updates.title: The Cafe is now a community forum
updates.description: The Cafe grew from small-group check-ins into a community-wide forum. Start threads, ask training questions, and talk shop with the whole Tribos community — your small-group check-ins are still there under My Cafe.
details: Community-wide discussion threads, open to everyone
Reactions and replies on posts
Small-group check-ins live on under the My Cafe tab

updates.title: A direct line to the builder
updates.description: The beta feedback button now floats bottom-right on every page. Bugs, ideas, questions — every message goes straight to Travis, with the page you sent it from attached.
details: One click from anywhere in the app
Travis reads every single message

updates.title: Your TFI now reflects the full Tribos spec
updates.description: FITNESS / FATIGUE / FORM cells now show the server-computed values used by the AI coach, training-plan engine, and adaptive load model — instead of a parallel client-side estimate. Your displayed numbers may jump (typically up) the first time you open the dashboard.
details: Includes the spec §3.1 terrain multiplier on power-less rides
Mountain-bike sessions carry the proprietary 1.3× stress multiplier
Uses your personal time constant (set from your age in Settings) instead of a fixed 42-day window
Closes a duality where the chart and dashboard could disagree on the same day

updates.title: Coaching Check-ins
updates.description: Your coach now checks in on you proactively. Each coach persona has a distinct voice and reviews your week — giving you feedback, accountability, and next steps without you having to ask.
details: Persona system with distinct coach voices and personalities
Proactive weekly check-ins that review your training load and compliance
Conversational follow-ups and coach memory across sessions

updates.title: Route Analysis & Workout Export
updates.description: Routes now detect climbs and key segments automatically. Match segments to workouts from your library and export structured workouts as FIT files to ride on your head unit.
details: Automatic segment detection from route terrain and Strava data
Workout-segment matching to pair intervals with real road features
FIT file export for structured workouts on Garmin, Wahoo, and more

updates.title: Multi-Sport Activity Tracking
updates.description: Tribos now tracks running and other activities alongside your rides. Sport-specific metrics show up in your dashboard and your coach understands your full training picture.
details: Running and cross-training activities synced and displayed
Sport-specific metrics in your dashboard and Today's Focus card
Coaching context includes all your activities, not just cycling

updates.title: Route Builder - Manual Mode
updates.description: Take full control of your routes. Click to place waypoints, drag to adjust, and build exactly the ride you want with real-time elevation and surface info.
details: Draggable waypoints with snap-to-roads or freehand drawing
Gradient-colored route line showing slope and surface type overlay
Elevation profile with click-drag selection and section metrics

updates.title: Smart Route Editing
updates.description: Edit your routes with natural language. Describe what you want — add a hill, avoid a road, extend the loop — and watch it adjust your route in real time.
details: Natural language commands to reshape your route
Smart POIs along your route — water, food, bike shops, viewpoints
Compare 2-3 segment alternatives between any two waypoints

updates.title: Training Plans on Your Calendar
updates.description: Your coach can now build structured training plans and place them directly onto your calendar. Plans adapt to your schedule and the coach remembers your history across sessions.
details: Coach-generated plans dropped straight onto your training calendar
Coach memory across sessions for smarter recommendations
Schedule-aware planning that respects your availability

updates.title: Coach Experience Redesign
updates.description: A faster, more integrated coaching experience. Access your coach from a spotlight-style command bar and get proactive suggestions right on your dashboard.
details: Spotlight-style command bar for quick coach access
Inline CoachCard with proactive training suggestions
Unified workout recommendations across all surfaces

updates.title: Garmin Sync Reliability
updates.description: Major reliability overhaul for Garmin data syncing. Your rides now process more consistently, and you'll get a heads-up if your connection ever needs attention.
details: Fixed webhook processing for more reliable activity imports
Proactive alerts when your Garmin connection needs attention
Improved token refresh and rate limiting

updates.title: Ride Data Accuracy Fixes
updates.description: Cleaned up ride summary calculations so your numbers are accurate. Bad sensor values are now filtered out and Work (kJ) is calculated correctly.
details: FIT file sentinel values filtered from summaries
Corrected Work (kJ) calculation
Force-reprocess mode for fixing historical rides

updates.title: The Cafe - Community & Accountability
updates.description: Find your people. Join small groups of 5-10 cyclists with similar goals for weekly check-ins, discussions, and accountability. Like meeting up at your favorite cafe stop, but online.
details: Weekly check-ins to share reflections, not ride spam
Discussion threads for training questions and advice
Goal-matched groups so you train with like-minded riders

updates.title: Smarter Route Generation
updates.description: Routes now build segment-by-segment along real roads, giving you more natural loops that hit your target distance accurately. No more weird detours or off-road surprises.
details: Routes follow actual road networks
More accurate distance targeting
Better loop shapes that make sense

comingSoon.title: Enhanced analytics
comingSoon.description: Deeper insights into your training trends

comingSoon.title: More export & sharing options
comingSoon.description: Get your routes and workouts onto more devices and platforms
